login.title: Sign in
login.description: Enter your phone number and password.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your phone number and we'll send a reset code.
forgotPassword.emailSent: If an account exists for {{email}}, we've sent a password reset code.

resetPassword.title: Set new password
resetPassword.successMessage: Your password has been updated. You can sign in now.
resetPassword.missingToken: Missing reset token. Use the link from your email.

home.welcome: Welcome, {{name}}. You can add dashboard cards and role-based sections here later.
home.cardContent: Content for this card will go here.
home.visitorDescription: This block is visible to users with the visitor role. New users get this role by default.
home.managerDescription: This block is visible only to users with the manager role. Permissions on routes and endpoints can be added later.
home.commentorDescription: This block is visible only to users with the commentor role.

error.pageNotFound: The requested page could not be found.
